justifications.clarity: Definitions are precise and transitions are seamless; the five-phase loop (Observe, Propose, Act, Evaluate, Revise) is stated formally, then each phase is tied back to the goal's three properties (Concrete/Checkable/Decomposable) and the seven-step template, so the reader is never lost about how a concept connects to the next.
justifications.rigor: Claims are consistently supported and assumptions are flagged (every credit figure marked 'illustrative', Meridian marked 'fictional', the economics labeled an 'illustrative sketch'); the arithmetic reconciles by construction (stressed EL = 0.09 x 0.55 x $40m = $1.98m = 495 bps) and the lineage section grounds the loop in cited literature (ReAct, Reflexion, Self-Refine, spiral model, PDCA).
justifications.completeness: Every stated learning objective is delivered: open-loop fragility, the goal-directed loop, goals as control objects, the agent/skill/hook trio, two contrasting worked examples (root-finding and the eleven-iteration credit-risk arc), human oversight/audit trails, six failure modes, five design patterns, and a Further Reading map to the book chapter and appendices.
justifications.pedagogy: Difficulty progresses deliberately from a single-scalar transparent example explicitly framed as the template ('only the state variable, the validator, and the definition of residual change') to a nine-agent capstone; bad-goal/good-goal and when-not-to-loop tables, plus the 'new employee every morning' amnesia analogy, scaffold understanding effectively.
justifications.style: Prose is natural and varied with no AI boilerplate; notation ($G$, $\mathrm{ok}(\cdot)$, $a_{t+1}=\pi(s_{t+1},e_{t+1},h_t)$) is consistent throughout, markdown tables and the pseudocode block are correctly formatted, and the finance analogies (front-office/back-office handoff, pre-trade limit check) read as authored, not generated.
